creator: mandree@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 213805
trivial update from fetchmail 6.4.3 to 6.4.4

Hi Corey, and ports-secteam,

can I commit this - I have put a convenience URL that diffs 6.4.3 to 6.4.4 in Git. No code changes, just ja.po, the resulting gettext file, and version number bump.

Build tests pass on 11.3 i386, 11.3 amd64, 12.1 i386, 12.1 amd64, 12.1 MIPS64 and 12.1 Aarch64 (ARM64) for fetchmail and fetchmailconf in poudriere and also 12.1 amd64 in a live system, where a quick run-time smoke test also passes.


Side remark: in my qemu-based poudriere jails hosted on 12.1 amd64,
the two RISC architectures complain about 
=>> Error: Filesystem touched during build:
(14:42:42) mandree: [00:01:40] usr/local/lib/python3.7/__pycache__/_sysconfigdata_m_freebsd12_.cpython-37.pyc: 

which isn't related to fetchmailconf, and also happened with 6.4.2 and 6.4.3. Not sure if that's due to qemu or the RISCs, and it's a cache file, so I deem these harmless.
